packages/coding-agent/src/prompts/tools/.tokenizer: floor(utf8Bytes/4) approximation applied identically to before and after
floor(utf8Bytes/4) approximation applied identically to before and after

fullApiReference: docs/tools/browser.md (pre-existing, verified to cover all tab.* helpers, browser kinds, CDP/profile details)

editEval.method: Targeted edit-tool suite comparison on identical corpus: dev prompt contents (git stash baseline) vs trimmed prompt contents. The hashline template feeds the edit tool description; the suites exercise hashline parsing, native hashline, edit diffs, fallbacks, auto-generated regressions, streaming previews, and renderer contracts.
editEval.command: bun test test/core/hashline.test.ts test/core/hashline-native.test.ts test/core/hashline-native-nul.test.ts test/edit-diff.test.ts test/edit-diff-fallback.test.ts test/edit-auto-generated-regressions.test.ts test/edit-per-file-diff-content.test.ts test/edit-streaming-preview.test.ts test/tools/edit-diff.test.ts test/tools/edit-renderer.test.ts test/system-prompt-templates.test.ts

constraintsHonored: No browser or edit tool behavior/API changes; prompt markdown only.
Hashline retains all rules content (common-failures merged into rules without dropping obligations); two examples kept; anti-pattern section removed as duplicate of rules.
Browser prompt names the exact self-serve docs path docs/tools/browser.md.
